title: Buying a Phone Card 充话费
scene: 在便利店充值手机话费。

lines.en: Hi, I need to top up my phone. Can I do that here?
lines.zh: 你好，我需要给手机充值。这里可以充吗？

lines.en: Yes, of course. Which phone company are you with?
lines.zh: 当然可以。您用的是什么运营商？

lines.en: I am with China Mobile. My number is 1-3-8-1-2-3-4-5-6-7-8.
lines.zh: 我是中国移动的。我的号码是13812345678。

lines.en: How much would you like to top up? We have cards for thirty, fifty, and one hundred yuan.
lines.zh: 您想充多少？我们有三十、五十和一百元的。

lines.en: Fifty yuan, please. Can I also buy a data plan?
lines.zh: 请充五十元。我还可以办一个流量套餐吗？

lines.en: Sure. For fifty yuan, you can get ten gigabytes of data valid for one month.
lines.zh: 可以的。五十元可以买十个G的流量，有效期一个月。

lines.en: That sounds good. I will take it. How much is the total?
lines.zh: 听起来不错。我要了。总共多少钱？

lines.en: The top-up is fifty yuan and the data plan is thirty yuan. That is eighty yuan in total.
lines.zh: 充值五十元，流量套餐三十元。总共八十元。

lines.en: Here is one hundred yuan. Keep the change. Thanks!
lines.zh: 这是一百元。不用找了。谢谢！
